claim_boundary: Sample cases exercise Workbench UI states only. They are not validated solver receipts, release evidence, or accuracy benchmark results.

cases.purpose: Shows a demo analysis with explicit convergence and residual history.
Shows a demo analysis that did not meet convergence tolerances.
Shows that residual history or imported model metadata must not imply convergence.
Shows the deployable live-case shape for public evidence preview; provenance is marked sample-not-a-release.
